extracted_text:
Module 10: Streamlit Dashboard

What dashboard does: choose a movie
see recommendations
see similarity results
see charts about taste
understand why recommendations were given.

Possible Dashboard Sections: search bar for movie
user profile panel
recommended movie cards
explanation text
chart for genres, decades, actors
sentiment score view

Skills: Streamlit basics, displaying tables/cards/charts, calling backend/model

Module 11: Evaluation & Testing

What can be evaluated? 
recommendations relevant?
do users get movies they may like?
does hybrid perform better than single methods?
does sentiment re-ranking help?

Simple Metrics: RMSE
Precision
Recall

matched_points: Dashboard explains why recommendations were made
Dashboard should mention backend or model integration
Evaluation should test relevance of recommendations
Evaluation should test whether users get movies they may like
Testing should mention usefulness of similarity results
missing_points: Hybrid system should be compared against individual methods

matched_points: Metrics should explain what RMSE measures
Metrics should explain what Precision measures
Metrics should explain what Recall measures
